---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How would you like this feature to work? -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or approaches? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, code examples, or references -->

---

**Before submitting, please review:**
- [High-Level Design (HLD)](../../docs/HLD.md) — Ensure the feature aligns with AegisUI's architecture
- [Low-Level Design (LLD)](../../docs/LLD.md) — Consider implementation constraints
- [Non-Goals](../../docs/NON_GOALS.md) — Verify the feature is not explicitly out of scope

**Note:** Features that violate the design constraints or fall under non-goals will not be accepted.
